--- Daytime events (should work) ---
OK: EST morning standup - evt-001 fires at 2025-01-15T14:00 UTC

#!/bin/bash
set -e

cd /app

FAILURES=0

run_check() {
    local desc="$1"
    local utc_time="$2"
    local expected_id="$3"
    local should_fire="$4"  # "yes" or "no"

    output=$(python3 app/runner.py app/config.json "$utc_time" 2>&1) || true

    if [ "$should_fire" = "yes" ]; then
        if echo "$output" | grep -q "FIRE.*$expected_id"; then
            echo "OK: $desc - $expected_id fires at $utc_time UTC"
        e

final_test_output:
=== Timezone Scheduling Tests ===

--- Daytime events (should work) ---
OK: EST morning standup - evt-001 fires at 2025-01-15T14:00 UTC
OK: UTC noon health check - evt-005 fires at 2025-01-15T12:00 UTC
OK: CET morning report - evt-003 fires at 2025-01-15T07:00 UTC

--- Late night events (the bug zone) ---
OK: EST nightly sync (crosses midnight) - evt-002 fires at 2025-01-16T04:30 UTC
OK: PST late cleanup (crosses midnight) - evt-004 fires at 2025-01-16T07:45 UTC

--- Negative tests (should NOT fire) ---
OK: Wrong hour for standup - evt-001 correctly not fired at 2025-01-15T15:00 UTC
OK: Nightly sync at wrong time - evt-002 correctly not fired at 2025-01-15T23:30 UTC

PASS: All scheduling tests passed
